name: Solomani Star Marines
description: The Confederation's elite shipboard assault troops — the Star Marines. Trained for zero-g operations, boarding actions, orbital assault drops, and Battle Dress deployment. The premier strike force of the Solomani military. Qualification: END 6+. DM-1 for every previous career. Commission: SOC 8+.

support.name: Support
support.description: You provide logistics, medical support and technical backup to the assault teams.

star_marine.name: Star Marine
star_marine.description: You fight in zero-g environments, shipboard boarding actions, and orbital assault drops.

battledress.name: Battledress
battledress.description: You operate Battle Dress armour in the Confederation's most dangerous and prestigious assault operations.

mishaps.1: Severely injured in action (treat as a result of 2 on the Injury Table). Alternatively, roll twice on the Injury Table and take the lower result.
mishaps.2: An orbital assault goes catastrophically wrong and you are stranded behind enemy lines. Gain an Enemy and one level in any skill you choose.
mishaps.3: You witness atrocities — committed by your own unit or the enemy — that cannot be reconciled with the Solomani Cause. Reduce INT or SOC by 1 and muster out.
mishaps.4: You are captured by Imperial or alien forces and spend months as a prisoner before repatriation. Gain a Contact (fellow prisoner) and an Enemy; you cannot re-enlist this term.
mishaps.5: Your commanding officer is killed, disgraced or promoted past you, and you are forced out. Gain a Rival.
mishaps.6: Injured. Roll on the Injury Table.

events.2: Disaster! Roll on the Mishap Table, but you are not ejected from this career.
events.3: You are involved in a boarding action against an Imperial or pirate vessel. Gain one of Vacc Suit 1, Gun Combat 1, Melee 1 or Tactics (military) 1.
events.4: You are deployed to a war-torn planet in a combined-arms orbital assault. Gain one of Recon 1, Survival 1, Stealth 1 or Gun Combat 1.
events.5: You receive a commendation for your actions in the field. Gain DM+1 to any one Benefit roll.
events.6: You perform with distinction in a zero-g engagement. Gain Vacc Suit 1 or Athletics (dexterity) 1.
events.7: Life Event. Roll on the Solomani Life Events table.
events.8: You receive advanced specialist training. Roll EDU 8+ to gain any one skill listed on the Service or Advanced Education tables at level 1.
events.9: Your unit leads a successful orbital drop or boarding action that becomes a model for future operations. Gain DM+2 to your next Advancement check.
events.10: You rescue a fellow Star Marine under heavy fire. Gain them as an Ally and DM+1 to any one Benefit roll, or transfer to the Confederation Army without a Qualification roll.
events.11: You attend advanced specialist training. Either gain one level in Battle Dress, Heavy Weapons, Explosives or Tactics (military), or take DM+4 to your next Advancement roll.
events.12: Your actions in a critical operation bring honour to the Confederation and the Corps. You are automatically promoted.
